title: crataegus pinnatifida var. pinnatifida
intro: Crataegus pinnatifida var. pinnatifida, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant's berries and leaves have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus pinnatifida var. pinnatifida include reducing blood pressure, improving lipid profiles, and enhancing cardiovascular function, as well as its potential anti-diabetic and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
